name: bactopia-py
description: Python CLI tools for working with Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-citations
commands.description: Print out tools and citations used throughout Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-datasets
commands.description: Download optional datasets to supplement analyses

commands.name: bactopia-download
commands.description: Build Conda/Docker/Singularity environments for Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-prepare
commands.description: Create a file of filenames (FOFN) of samples for Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-search
commands.description: Query ENA and SRA for public accessions to process

commands.name: bactopia-summary
commands.description: Generate summary table with quality rankings from results

commands.name: bactopia-update
commands.description: Check for newer versions of modules used by Bactopia Tools

commands.name: bactopia-status
commands.description: Show repository status including git info, test coverage, and tier details

commands.name: bactopia-sysinfo
commands.description: Auto-detect host RAM and CPUs and emit Nextflow CLI overrides

commands.name: bactopia-workflows
commands.description: List available Bactopia workflows and output paths

commands.name: bactopia-prune
commands.description: Remove unused Conda/Singularity environments

commands.name: bactopia-test
commands.description: Run nf-test suites across Bactopia components

commands.name: bactopia-lint
commands.description: Lint Bactopia pipeline components against coding standards

commands.name: bactopia-catalog
commands.description: Generate a catalog.json of Bactopia pipeline components

commands.name: bactopia-review-tests
commands.description: Analyze nf-test timing and compare against baselines

commands.name: bactopia-merge-schemas
commands.description: Merge Nextflow schemas for Bactopia workflows

commands.name: bactopia-atb-formatter
commands.description: Restructure AllTheBacteria assemblies for Bactopia Tools

commands.name: bactopia-atb-downloader
commands.description: Download assemblies from AllTheBacteria database

commands.name: bactopia-pubmlst-setup
commands.description: One-time setup for PubMLST REST API credentials

commands.name: bactopia-pubmlst-build
commands.description: Build PubMLST MLST databases for Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-check-fastqs
commands.description: Verify FASTQs meet minimum quality and size requirements

commands.name: bactopia-check-assembly-accession
commands.description: Verify NCBI Assembly accession is current and valid

commands.name: bactopia-cleanup-coverage
commands.description: Reduce per-base coverage file redundancy with run-length encoding

commands.name: bactopia-mask-consensus
commands.description: Mask Snippy consensus sequence with low-coverage regions

commands.name: bactopia-kraken-bracken-summary
commands.description: Update Bracken abundances with unclassified read counts from Kraken2

commands.name: bactopia-scrubber-summary
commands.description: Generate before/after report of human read scrubbing

commands.name: bactopia-teton-prepare
commands.description: Prepare sample sheets for the Teton variant-calling workflow

commands.name: bactopia-bracken-to-excel
commands.description: Export Bracken abundance tables to Excel format
